title: horsfieldia irya
intro: Horsfieldia irya, also known as the Irya tree or Horsfield's dipterocarp, is a species of flowering plant in the family Dipterocarpaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in Southeast Asian folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Horsfieldia irya include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and improve cardiovascular health. Horsfieldia irya can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, or used as a tincture or extract in traditional medicine practices.
